middleware.description: Thin wrapper over `Nnjeim\World\Http\Middleware\Locale`. Reads ?locale query, falls back to Accept-Language, then app locale. Sets a request-scoped locale on the vendor's LocaleService so HasWorldLocalizedName resolves correctly. Runs AFTER localization::locale.resolve when both modules are present (deferred to Stackra locale by default).

Response cache for reference-catalog GETs. Keys entries by `${prefix}:${verb}:${path}:${sha1(sortedQuery)}:${locale}` with the default cache store (Redis in production, array in tests). TTL from config('geography.cache.ttl'), default 3600s. Bypassed when config('geography.cache.enabled') is false. NEVER wraps /geolocate (per-user IP-specific responses handled by the vendor's separate cache).

rate_limiter_definitions.name: geolocate
rate_limiter_definitions.default: 10 req/min per user_id (falls back to per_ip for guests, though guest calls to /geolocate are refused by auth:sanctum before reaching the limiter)
